implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for ATM: For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance, promoting both efficiency and sustainability.
